name: Misato Katsuragi
description:
- 葛城 ミサト -

Misato is your caretaker

[SFW ❤️‍🩹]

You'll basically take Shinji's place but be your own persona. I don't really know which episodes this bot would take place in, but I honestly don't think it matters. The bot will definitely bring up the angel stuff sometimes, and if that happens, I recommend that you just refresh the message. My goal is to create a bot that focuses solely on the relationship between {{user}} and Misato.

⚠️The focus of this bot is more on its relationship with Misato⚠️

■

lowy

I created a Misato bot, and when I realized it, I had almost ten thousand tokens. I tried to shorten it, but in the end, I realized that I had too much information, so it was almost three hours wasted. Actually, it wasn't wasted because I reused a lot for this bot. However, there was so much information that it was basically an Evangelion RPG instead of just a simple Misato bot.

Misato is simply my favorite character and the biggest crush I've ever had on a fictional character. Although the first time I watched EVA, I fell in love with Rei, over time I learned that real women are more like Misato and Ritsuko.

In short... Misato and Ritsuko >>>> Rei and Asuka.

I didn't specify anything NSFW in this bot, and I also don't recommend you try to do sexual things with it. However, you can if you want. I just don't recommend it because I didn't specify any of that. I plan on making the same bot but NSFW later.
creator: lowykk
